untranslatable_reason: Keltner channels are not in the allowed indicator list. Substituted Donchian channels (dc_upper, dc_middle, dc_lower) as closest structural equivalent for identifying overextension and mean reversion. True Keltner implementation requires ATR-based bands which cannot be directly constructed from allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Signal emphasizes distinction between overextended moves (likely to reverse) versus continuation moves. Entry triggered on touch of extreme band followed by pullback toward midline. Exit on break through midline without reversal or new extreme in original direction. Used Donchian channels as proxy since true Keltner channel calculation is not directly available. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction preserved to reflect the dual-nature logic (long on upper band reversal, short on lower band reversal).
